reviews_list.review_title: I am satisfied with our college.

review_content.Infrastructure: The canteen, hostel, and mess are not there, but sports and games are. They need to start a canteen in our college, but many students are not interested in eating canteen food because it is in a rural area. They usually bring their own lunch boxes.

reviews_list.review_title: Review of Srikrupa Institute of Pharmaceutical Sciences.

review_content.Placements: About 75% of students are ready to get an internship. Our college provides all facilities for students. It conducts various programs and encourages us. Many students got a job in Dr Reddy's Laboratories. The college also conducts educational tour to Mysore to make us clarity on the industries.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college provides a good library where we can get all the books. The college provides free Wi-Fi facility and labs with all equipment. The college does not provide hostel facility for the students.
review_content.Faculty: All the teachers in our college are PhD holders from top universities and colleges in India. Their encouragement is good. The course curriculum is decided based on industries and studies, which is good in clarification on the way to get an internship. They guide us. They teach well. They explain our doubts clearly.

reviews_list.review_title: Good academic base, average placements, and facilities.

review_content.Placements: I was a part of the B.Com. Batch of 2021-2024. Around 15 percent of students were placed with the highest package being 5 LPA the lowest being 2 LPA and the average being around 3 LPA. Top recruiters included Wipro HDFC Bank and ICICI Prudential. A few students also got internships in companies like HDFC and Axis Bank. Common roles offered were sales executive accountant and back office support. Decent experience overall though placement opportunities could be improved.
review_content.Infrastructure: The B.Com. department had Wi-Fi good classrooms a library, and basic computer labs. Hostel was average food in the mess was okay and the canteen had better options. Medical help was available and there were basic sports facilities too. Overall infrastructure was decent.

highlights.summary: The KCET 2026 registration window for admission to the BE/BTech course is now closed. The KCET exam 2026 will be held on Apr 23 and Apr 24, 2026.

reviews_list.review_title: It's good to be here for self-knowledge and to learn various handling skills for the college.

review_content.Placements: Since ours is the first batch yet, placements have to be done in the next year, so we are waiting for that. But sir has assured us that they will provide us the placements for sure. And also, we'll recognize companies that will be gathered for industrial visits too.
review_content.Infrastructure: Hostel facilities and infrastructure are good, and it's been many years. And 24 hours of water and electricity are available. A well-spaced hostel with 4 students in a room for pharmacy students is here. A big ground is there in front of the hostel itself. Hostel timings are to be followed.

reviews_list.review_title: Good college overall and you can take admission here.

review_content.Placements: The highest package is around 6 lacs per year. Placements depend on your skills and the practical knowledge that you will gain here. It is best to have good connections with all faculty members, as they will help you every time and will get good jobs in this pharmacy.
review_content.Infrastructure: A library, a digital library, labs and equipment are provided. A healthy discussion over study problems is held. The course is all good because of its numerous job facilities in various fields. After B.Pharma, MPharm might hold you in a good position in future times. Jobs like teaching, drug inspector, in fields like research and development, etc. can be achieved.

reviews_list.review_title: Overall, it's not too good nor too bad.

review_content.Placements: We have acquired a substantial amount of knowledge, and we continue to receive the same from our lecturers. The fees I paid per year were 1.45 lakh, which is actually the low cost, including college and hostel fees. We have learned many basics in theory and practical aspects. Overall, we will get to learn many things.
review_content.Infrastructure: We have a hostel from the college itself and a library where I sit and enjoy new concepts from books. We also have labs with all the necessary equipment. Regarding hostel food, I can't say a word because it's like that. We won't adjust to this at all. Other than hostel food, everything is good.
